---
title: "Test Framework Results Dashboard"
subtitle: "Agent Almanac — Cross-Scenario Analysis"
author: "Philipp Thoss"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 6
params:
  results_file: "results.yml"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(yaml)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)

results <- yaml::read_yaml(params$results_file)
scenarios <- results$scenarios

# ── Build data frames ───────────────────────────────────────────────

scenarios_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(scenarios, function(s) {
  data.frame(
    id = s$id,
    name = s$name,
    date = as.Date(s$date),
    test_level = s$test_level,
    target = s$target,
    coordination_pattern = ifelse(is.null(s$coordination_pattern),
                                   "none", s$coordination_pattern),
    team_size = s$team_size,
    verdict = s$verdict,
    duration = s$duration_minutes,
    ac_passed = s$acceptance_criteria$passed,
    ac_total = s$acceptance_criteria$total,
    ac_threshold = s$acceptance_criteria$threshold,
    rubric_score = s$rubric$total_score,
    rubric_max = s$rubric$total_max,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

scenarios_df$ac_pct <- round(scenarios_df$ac_passed / scenarios_df$ac_total * 100, 0)
scenarios_df$rubric_pct <- round(scenarios_df$rubric_score / scenarios_df$rubric_max * 100, 0)
scenarios_df$name_short <- sub("^(The |Test )", "", scenarios_df$name)

criteria_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(scenarios, function(s) {
  do.call(rbind, lapply(s$acceptance_criteria$details, function(d) {
    data.frame(
      scenario = s$name,
      test_level = s$test_level,
      criterion = d$criterion,
      result = d$result,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
}))

rubric_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(scenarios, function(s) {
  do.call(rbind, lapply(s$rubric$dimensions, function(d) {
    data.frame(
      scenario = s$name,
      test_level = s$test_level,
      dimension = d$dimension,
      score = d$score,
      max = d$max,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
}))
rubric_df$pct <- round(rubric_df$score / rubric_df$max * 100, 0)

# ── Color palettes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

verdict_colors <- c(PASS = "#2e7d32", FAIL = "#c62828", PARTIAL = "#f57f17")

pattern_colors <- c(
  adaptive = "#5c6bc0",
  `hub-and-spoke` = "#26a69a",
  sequential = "#66bb6a",
  reciprocal = "#ab47bc",
  none = "#9e9e9e"
)

level_colors <- c(team = "#42a5f5", agent = "#ff7043", skill = "#66bb6a")

# ── Theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

theme_dashboard <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#666666"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

## Executive Summary

```{r}
total_scenarios <- nrow(scenarios_df)
total_pass <- sum(scenarios_df$verdict == "PASS")
total_ac_passed <- sum(scenarios_df$ac_passed)
total_ac <- sum(scenarios_df$ac_total)
total_rubric <- sum(scenarios_df$rubric_score)
total_rubric_max <- sum(scenarios_df$rubric_max)
cov <- results$coverage
```

This dashboard summarizes **`r total_scenarios`** test scenario executions across the agent-almanac test framework.

```{r kpi-table}
kpi_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Scenarios", "Acceptance Criteria", "Rubric Score",
             "Patterns Tested", "Test Levels"),
  Value = c(
    paste0(total_pass, "/", total_scenarios, " PASS"),
    paste0(total_ac_passed, "/", total_ac,
           " (", round(total_ac_passed / total_ac * 100), "%)"),
    paste0(total_rubric, "/", total_rubric_max,
           " (", round(total_rubric / total_rubric_max * 100), "%)"),
    paste0(length(cov$coordination_patterns$tested), "/",
           cov$coordination_patterns$total),
    paste0(length(cov$test_levels$tested), "/", cov$test_levels$total)
  )
)

kbl(kpi_df, col.names = c("", ""), align = "lr") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = FALSE,
                font_size = 15) |>
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE, width = "14em") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "14em")
```

## Scenario Summary

```{r summary-table}
summary_tbl <- scenarios_df |>
  arrange(date) |>
  transmute(
    Scenario = name,
    Level = test_level,
    Pattern = coordination_pattern,
    `AC Score` = paste0(ac_passed, "/", ac_total),
    `AC %` = paste0(ac_pct, "%"),
    `Rubric` = paste0(rubric_score, "/", rubric_max),
    `Rubric %` = paste0(rubric_pct, "%"),
    Duration = ifelse(duration >= 60,
                      paste0("~", round(duration / 60, 1), "h"),
                      paste0("~", duration, "m")),
    Verdict = verdict
  )

kbl(summary_tbl, align = "llllrlrlc") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE) |>
  column_spec(9, color = ifelse(summary_tbl$Verdict == "PASS",
                                "#2e7d32", "#c62828"),
              bold = TRUE)
```


## Acceptance Criteria Analysis

### Pass Rate by Scenario

```{r ac-bar}
plot_df <- scenarios_df |>
  arrange(ac_pct) |>
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = name, y = ac_pct, fill = verdict)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(ac_passed, "/", ac_total)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = verdict_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 115), labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Acceptance Criteria Pass Rate",
       x = NULL, y = "Pass rate", fill = "Verdict") +
  theme_dashboard
```

### Criteria Outcomes

```{r ac-stacked}
criteria_summary <- criteria_df |>
  count(scenario, result) |>
  mutate(result = factor(result, levels = c("PASS", "PARTIAL", "FAIL")))

ggplot(criteria_summary, aes(x = reorder(scenario, n, sum), y = n, fill = result)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = verdict_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Acceptance Criteria Outcomes",
       subtitle = "Per-criterion PASS / PARTIAL / FAIL",
       x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = "Result") +
  theme_dashboard
```


## Rubric Score Analysis

### Overall Rubric Score

```{r rubric-bar}
plot_df <- scenarios_df |>
  arrange(rubric_pct) |>
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = name, y = rubric_pct, fill = test_level)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(rubric_score, "/", rubric_max)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = level_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 115), labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Rubric Score (Normalized)",
       x = NULL, y = "Score %", fill = "Test Level") +
  theme_dashboard
```

### Dimension Scores by Test Level

```{r rubric-dimensions, fig.height=8}
rubric_df$dimension <- factor(rubric_df$dimension,
                              levels = rev(unique(rubric_df$dimension)))

ggplot(rubric_df, aes(x = dimension, y = score, color = scenario)) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = dimension, y = 0, yend = score), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5.5), breaks = 1:5) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ test_level, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "Rubric Dimensions",
       subtitle = "Scores by test level (each dimension is 1-5)",
       x = NULL, y = "Score", color = "Scenario") +
  theme_dashboard +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))
```

## By Coordination Pattern

```{r pattern-table}
pattern_summary <- scenarios_df |>
  filter(coordination_pattern != "none") |>
  group_by(Pattern = coordination_pattern) |>
  summarise(
    Scenarios = n(),
    `Avg AC %` = paste0(round(mean(ac_pct)), "%"),
    `Avg Rubric %` = paste0(round(mean(rubric_pct)), "%"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(Scenarios))

kbl(pattern_summary) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r pattern-chart}
pattern_plot <- scenarios_df |>
  filter(coordination_pattern != "none") |>
  group_by(coordination_pattern) |>
  summarise(ac_pct = mean(ac_pct), rubric_pct = mean(rubric_pct),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ac_pct, rubric_pct),
               names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
  mutate(metric = ifelse(metric == "ac_pct",
                         "Acceptance Criteria", "Rubric Score"))

ggplot(pattern_plot, aes(x = reorder(coordination_pattern, value),
                         y = value, fill = coordination_pattern)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value), "%")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pattern_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 115), labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ metric) +
  labs(title = "Performance by Coordination Pattern",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_dashboard +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
```


## By Test Level

```{r level-table}
level_summary <- scenarios_df |>
  group_by(Level = test_level) |>
  summarise(
    Scenarios = n(),
    `Avg AC %` = paste0(round(mean(ac_pct)), "%"),
    `Avg Rubric %` = paste0(round(mean(rubric_pct)), "%"),
    `Avg Duration` = paste0(round(mean(duration), 1), "m"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kbl(level_summary) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r level-chart}
level_plot <- scenarios_df |>
  group_by(test_level) |>
  summarise(ac_pct = mean(ac_pct), rubric_pct = mean(rubric_pct),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ac_pct, rubric_pct),
               names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
  mutate(metric = ifelse(metric == "ac_pct",
                         "Acceptance Criteria", "Rubric Score"))

ggplot(level_plot, aes(x = test_level, y = value, fill = test_level)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value), "%")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = level_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 115), labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric) +
  labs(title = "Performance by Test Level",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_dashboard +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
```


## Coverage Dashboard

```{r coverage-table}
cov_df <- data.frame(
  Dimension = c("Coordination Patterns", "Test Levels", "Teams",
                "Agents", "Skills"),
  Tested = c(
    length(cov$coordination_patterns$tested),
    length(cov$test_levels$tested),
    length(cov$teams$tested),
    length(cov$agents$tested),
    length(cov$skills$tested)
  ),
  Total = c(
    cov$coordination_patterns$total,
    cov$test_levels$total,
    cov$teams$total,
    cov$agents$total,
    cov$skills$total
  )
)
cov_df$Gap <- cov_df$Total - cov_df$Tested
cov_df$`Coverage %` <- paste0(round(cov_df$Tested / cov_df$Total * 100), "%")

kbl(cov_df, align = "lrrrl") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r coverage-chart}
cov_long <- cov_df |>
  select(Dimension, Tested, Gap) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Tested, Gap),
               names_to = "status", values_to = "count") |>
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Gap", "Tested")))

ggplot(cov_long, aes(x = reorder(Dimension, count, sum),
                     y = count, fill = status)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, position = "stack") +
  geom_text(data = cov_long |> filter(status == "Tested"),
            aes(label = count), hjust = 1.2, color = "white",
            fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Gap = "#e0e0e0", Tested = "#42a5f5")) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Test Coverage",
       subtitle = "Tested items vs. total available",
       x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = NULL) +
  theme_dashboard
```

**Untested coordination patterns**: `r paste(cov$coordination_patterns$untested, collapse = ", ")`.


## Per-Scenario Details

::: {.panel-tabset}

```{r results='asis'}
for (s in scenarios) {
  cat("\n###", s$name, "\n\n")

  # Metadata
  meta <- data.frame(
    Field = c("Run ID", "Date", "Target", "Level", "Pattern",
              "Team Size", "Duration", "Verdict"),
    Value = c(s$run_id, s$date, s$target, s$test_level,
              ifelse(is.null(s$coordination_pattern), "—", s$coordination_pattern),
              s$team_size,
              ifelse(s$duration_minutes >= 60,
                     paste0("~", round(s$duration_minutes / 60, 1), "h"),
                     paste0("~", s$duration_minutes, "m")),
              s$verdict)
  )
  print(kbl(meta, col.names = NULL, align = "lr") |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = FALSE,
                  font_size = 13))
  cat("\n")

  # Acceptance criteria
  cat("#### Acceptance Criteria\n\n")
  ac_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(s$acceptance_criteria$details, function(d) {
    data.frame(Criterion = d$criterion, Result = d$result,
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }))
  ac_df$`#` <- seq_len(nrow(ac_df))
  ac_df <- ac_df[, c("#", "Criterion", "Result")]

  result_color <- ifelse(ac_df$Result == "PASS", "#2e7d32",
                  ifelse(ac_df$Result == "FAIL", "#c62828", "#f57f17"))

  print(kbl(ac_df, align = "rlc") |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE, font_size = 13) |>
    column_spec(3, color = result_color, bold = TRUE))
  cat("\n")

  # Rubric
  cat("#### Rubric Scores\n\n")
  rub_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(s$rubric$dimensions, function(d) {
    data.frame(Dimension = d$dimension,
               Score = paste0(d$score, "/", d$max),
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }))
  rub_df <- rbind(rub_df, data.frame(
    Dimension = "**Total**",
    Score = paste0("**", s$rubric$total_score, "/", s$rubric$total_max, "**")
  ))

  print(kbl(rub_df, align = "lr") |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE, font_size = 13))
  cat("\n")

  # Key findings
  cat("#### Key Findings\n\n")
  for (f in s$key_findings) {
    cat("-", f, "\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```

:::


## Appendix: Data Provenance

```{r provenance}
prov_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(scenarios, function(s) {
  data.frame(
    Scenario = s$name,
    `Result File` = paste0("`tests/results/", s$run_id, "/RESULT.md`"),
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

kbl(prov_df) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
```

**Data source**: `r params$results_file`
**Framework version**: `r results$framework$version`
**Last updated**: `r results$framework$last_updated`
